summary: Tailwind CSS v4 migration testing complete. All frontend pages load correctly with proper styling. Fixed @reference directive in App.css (changed from 'tailwindcss' to './index.css'). No visual regressions detected.

warnings.description: WebSocket notification connection fails on page load - not related to Tailwind migration
warnings.details: WebSocket connection to /api/ws/notifications fails - this is a pre-existing issue

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed @reference directive in App.css: changed from '@reference "tailwindcss"' to '@reference "./index.css"' for proper Tailwind v4 @apply support
Tailwind CSS v4 migration successful - all utility classes working correctly
CSS-first configuration in index.css @theme block working correctly
tw-animate-css replacement for tailwindcss-animate working correctly
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data

fix_applied.change: Changed @reference directive from 'tailwindcss' to './index.css' for proper Tailwind v4 @apply support
fix_applied.reason: Tailwind CSS v4 requires @reference to point to the CSS file containing @import 'tailwindcss' for @apply directives to work
